summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. Backend: 12/12 new iter6 tests PASS + 22/22 iter5 + 23/23 turonlimo_api regression PASS = 57/57 (100%). Brand rename to 'TuranEliteLimo' verified site-wide (homepage title, navbar wordmark, footer ©2025/2026, /admin/login, admin dashboard). Confirmation # now uses TEL- prefix (regex ^TEL-[A-HJ-NP-Z2-9]{6}$ matches; alphabet excludes I/O/0/1). POST /api/payments/checkout auto-generates TEL-XXXXXX when booking has no CN, persists it (verified via /bookings/{id}/public), and is idempotent on re-checkout (CN unchanged). GET /api/payments/status/{sid} no longer 500s when Stripe lookup fails — returns 200 with txn fallback (iter5 regression fix verified). PATCH /api/admin/bookings status=confirmed still generates CN with TEL- prefix and remains idempotent. Pricing PATCH/GET works. Frontend: booking-submit text dynamics verified — initial 'Proceed to Payment', after Executive Sedan + quote 'Proceed to Payment · $120.50' (Request Reservation path code-confirmed for call-only). Submit flow: POST /api/bookings 200 + POST /api/payments/checkout 200 + browser navigated to checkout.stripe.com (route intercepted to avoid full follow). Pricing tab Save buttons (6 of them) all show the word 'Save' next to a disk icon — clearly labeled. Cleanup: deposit_percent reset to 100, Executive Sedan reset to base=75 per_mile=3.5 minimum=85.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:46 FastAPI title='TuranEliteLimo API' and root() returns 'TuranEliteLimo' — brand consistent backend-side.

server.py:335 Nominatim User-Agent still contains 'reservations@turonlimo.com'. The internal admin/contact emails using turonlimo.com are intentional per agent_to_agent_context_note. No action required.
server.py:441 _generate_confirmation_number alphabet 'ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789' correctly excludes I, O, 0, 1 — matches spec.
server.py:603-606 create_payment_checkout properly generates CN only when missing and merges into both DB update_doc and in-memory booking before Stripe metadata — idempotency verified.

server.py:684-713 get_payment_status auto-confirms booking on Stripe 'paid': sets status='confirmed' and sends single combined confirmation email — matches spec. Stripe lookup wrapped in try/except — no longer 500s (iter5 fix preserved).
BookingForm.jsx:144-158 priced-vehicle path correctly POSTs /bookings then /payments/checkout then window.location.href=co.url. Error handling falls through to toast — graceful.
BookingForm.jsx:521-528 dynamic button text logic correct: 'Proceed to Payment · $X' for priced w/quote, 'Request Reservation' for call_only, 'Proceed to Payment' baseline.
PricingTab.jsx Save button now visibly labeled 'Save' with icon — UX win. (6 rows, 6 Save buttons rendered.)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (brand rename, dynamic submit text, priced submit -> Stripe redirect, Pricing Save labelled)

seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed bookings created and deleted within each test. UI test created 1 booking + 1 payment_transactions row that proceeded to Stripe redirect (left in DB intentionally — represents real customer flow). deposit_percent and Executive Sedan pricing reset at end via API curl (verified 200 response).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 spec items pass. Note: test_iteration5.py CN_REGEX was updated from '^TURN-[A-Z2-9]{6}$' to '^TEL-[A-HJ-NP-Z2-9]{6}$' (lines 13) to keep regression suite valid post-rename — these were the only mods to iter5 tests. The admin email admin@turonlimo.com is intentionally retained (internal credential per agent_to_agent_context_note); user-visible support email turonlimosupport@gmail.com unchanged. Stripe checkout uses sk_test_emergent — fresh session GETs occasionally fail in this env, but /payments/status now returns 200 with fallback (verified). For end-to-end Stripe paid -> auto-confirm -> email path, requires a real successful Stripe payment which can't be simulated without webhook simulation; the code path is correct (server.py:684-713) but not exercised in automated tests.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in iteration 6. All spec items passed.
